x-enumeration-literals.name: Savings Account Holder or Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description: The party that owns, operates or is financially responsible for the savings account arrangement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Savings Account Servicer or Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: The financial institution responsible for administering and servicing the savings account arrangement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Joint Account Holder
x-enumeration-literals.description: A party that shares ownership rights and responsibilities for the savings account arrangement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Beneficiary
x-enumeration-literals.description: A party designated to receive benefits, funds or entitlements associated with the savings account arrangement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Authorized Signatory
x-enumeration-literals.description: A party authorized to approve, validate or initiate transactions relating to the savings account arrangement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Nominee
x-enumeration-literals.description: A party appointed to act on behalf of the account holder in relation to the savings account arrangement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: An external authority involved in supervision, compliance or regulatory oversight relating to the savings account arrangement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Administrator
x-enumeration-literals.description: A party responsible for operational maintenance and administrative management of the savings account arrangement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Trustee
x-enumeration-literals.description: A party that manages or oversees the savings account arrangement on behalf of another party.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Guarantor
x-enumeration-literals.description: A party that provides assurance or financial backing associated with obligations linked to the savings account arrangement.
